title: `adar #5737
definition:
1) to help
    1a) (Qal) to help
 2) to hoe
    2a) (Niphal) to be hoed
 3) to be lacking, fail
    3a) (Niphal)
        3b1) to be lacking
        3b1) to leave lacking
    3b) (Piel) to leave lacking
